name: Bob Lazar S-4 Reverse-Engineering Claim
summary: Claim that Bob Lazar worked at an installation called S-4 near Area 51 and participated in analysis of non-human craft.
status: Highly influential public allegation; not established as fact by GreyAlien.
evidenceNote: The profile separates Lazar's public interviews and cultural influence from disputes regarding his education, employment history, and supporting evidence.
